parameters.description: 指示要注册的接口的 MIDL 生成的结构。 MgrTypeUuid 指向要与 MgrEpv 参数关联的 UUID 类型的指针。 指定 null 参数值 (或 nil UUID) 会将 IfSpec 注 册到 nil 类型 UUID。 MgrEpv 管理器例程的入口点矢量 (EPV) 。 若要使用 MIDL 生成的默认 EPV，请指定 null 值。 有关详细 信息，请参阅 RPC_MGR_EPV。 Flags 标志。 有关标志值的列表，请参阅 接口注册标志。 MaxCalls 服务器可以在自动侦听接口上接受的最大并发远程过程调用请求数。 MaxCalls 参数仅适用于自动侦听接口，在非自动侦听接口上将被忽略。 RPC 运行时库会尽最大努力确保服务器允许的并发调用请求数不会超过 MaxCalls 中指定的调用数。 实际数字可能更大，并且可能会因每个协议序列而异。 对其他接口的调用由 RpcServerListen 函数调用中指定的进程范围 MaxCalls 参数的值控制。如果并发调用数不是问题，则通过使用RPC_C_LISTEN_MAX_CALLS_DEFAULT指定默认值，可以实现稍微更好的服务器端性能。 这样做可以缓解 RPC 运行时环境强制实施不必要的限制。

entities.name: RpcBindingFromStringBinding
entities.description: Creates a server binding handle from the string representation of a binding handle. The StringBinding parameter does not need to contain a UUID object (in which case the returned binding contains nil UUID). If StringBinding doesn't contain an endpoint field, the returned Binding is a partially-bound handle. If StringBinding contains an endpoint field, it's treated as a known endpoint. If StringBinding doesn't contain a host address field, the Binding refers to localhost. Applications create string bindings by calling RpcStringBindingCompose or providing string constants. This method doesn't involve contacting the server - success/failure doesn't indicate server availability.

entities.name: RpcBindingReset
entities.description: Resets a binding handle without affecting its authentication information. If a client wants to be served by any compatible server instance on the host specified in the binding handle, it should call RpcBindingReset before making remote procedure calls. The client must not call RpcBindingReset for binding handles that already have specific endpoints. When using a reset (partially-bound) binding for the next remote procedure call, the RPC runtime uses known endpoints from the client's interface specification if available. Otherwise, it communicates with the endpoint mapper service to obtain endpoints from the endpoint mapping database. If a compatible server is found, the runtime updates the binding with the new endpoint. If not found, the call fails with EPT_S_NOT_REGISTERED for connection-oriented protocols (ncacn) or RPC_S_COMM_FAILURE for datagram protocols (ncadg).

entities.name: RpcBindingSetAuthInfo
entities.description: Sets authentication information for a remote procedure call (RPC) binding handle. The function takes a snapshot of the credentials, allowing memory dedicated to the AuthIdentity parameter to be freed before the binding handle. For application portability across different Microsoft RPC versions, it's recommended to maintain the pointer to AuthIdentity while the binding handle exists. Note: Windows XP SP2 and Windows Server 2003 SP1 do not require maintaining the AuthIdentity pointer for the binding handle's lifetime.

entities.name: RpcBindingSetAuthInfoEx
entities.description: Sets authentication information for a binding handle with extended options. This function takes a snapshot of credentials, allowing memory allocated for AuthIdentity to be freed after the call. Exception: when used with RPC_C_QOS_IDENTITY_DYNAMIC and non-NULL AuthIdentity. Note: Must not be called on a binding handle while RPC calls are in progress on the same handle.

entities.name: RpcBindingSetOption
entities.description: Sets options for a binding handle. This function can modify unbound handles similar to RpcBindingSetAuthInfoEx. A binding handle in unbound state can be rebound and reused for making calls. Note that calling RpcBindingUnbind does not necessarily disconnect the client from the server - it invalidates any cached information used by the binding handle but doesn't guarantee disconnection.

entities.name: RpcBindingToStringBinding
entities.description: Converts a client or server binding handle into its string representation. The RPC runtime library allocates memory for the string returned in the StringBinding parameter. The application is responsible for calling RpcStringFree to deallocate this memory. If the binding handle in the Binding parameter contains a nil object UUID segment, the returned string will not contain an object UUID field. To parse the returned StringBinding parameter, call RpcStringBindingParse. Note: To query a client's address, an application should first call RpcBindingServerFromClient to obtain a partially-bound server binding handle.

entities.name: RpcCancelThread
entities.description: Cancels an outstanding remote procedure call. This function should not be used to cancel calls that issue static callbacks. Do not cancel remote procedure calls that may invoke functions declared with the [callback] attribute in IDL files. By default, the client waits indefinitely for the server to return control after cancellation. To reduce this time, call RpcMgmtSetCancelTimeout specifying the number of seconds to wait for a response. If the server does not return within this interval, the call fails on the client with RPC_S_CALL_FAILED exception (server stub continues running). When using named pipe protocol (ncacn_np), a finite timeout must be specified. RpcCancelThread can be used with any connection-oriented protocol (ncacn_*) and any datagram protocol except ncadg_mq and ncalrpc. Note: On Windows XP/2000, RpcCancelThread does not work with ncacn_http. Support for ncacn_http was added in Windows Server 2003 and Windows XP SP1+.

entities.description: Starts enumeration of RPC errors. Supported on Windows XP and later, including Windows Server 2003.

entities.name: RpcExcept
entities.description: 为 RPC 应用程序提供结构化异常处理的语句。与 RpcTryExcept 和 RpcEndExcept 配合使用。
entities.syntax:
void RpcExcept(
expr);
参数 expr
发生异常时计算的表达式。 如果 表达式 的计算结果为非零值，则执行异常语句。 如果 表达式的计算结果为零值，则展开将继续到下一个 RpcTryExcept 或 RpcTryFinally 函数。
entities.remarks: 如果未发生异常，则会跳过 表达式 和 异常语句 ，并在 RpcEndExcept 语句后面的语句处继续执行。

entities.name: RpcFreeAuthorizationContext
entities.description: Frees the authorization context created by RpcGetAuthorizationContextForServer. [Desktop apps only] Supported in Windows XP and Windows Server 2003.

entities.name: RpcGetAuthorizationContextForClient
entities.description: Retrieves an authorization context for an RPC client. The function is thread-safe and can be called from multiple threads. The context returned in pAuthzClientContext is independent of the function call and can be used after completion. The caller must free the context by calling RpcFreeAuthorizationContext. Performance improvements depend on: frequency of calls for a client ID, protocol sequence, and identity tracking. Subsequent calls for the same client ID are highly efficient due to result caching.
entities.return_value: Returns RPC_S_OK if successful. Other return codes will cause the client to receive RPC_S_ACCESS_DENIED. See RPC return values for valid error codes.
entities.remarks: 在某些情况下，RPC 运行时可能会对每个接口的每个客户端多次调用安全回调函数。 请确保回调函数可以处理这种可能性。 安全回调必须声明为 RPC_ENTRY。

entities.name: RpcIfIdVectorFree
entities.description: Frees a vector of interface identifiers and the interface identifier structures it contains.

entities.name: RpcIfInqId
entities.description: 函数返回接口规范的接口标识部分。 RpcImpersonateClient 正在处理客户端远程过程调用的服务器线程可以调用 RpcImpersonateClient 函数来模拟活动客户端。

entities.name: RpcImpersonateClientContainer
entities.description: Impersonates the client container in an RPC call. After calling RpcImpersonateClientContainer and completing any tasks requiring client impersonation, the server should call RpcRevertToSelf to end impersonation and re-establish its own security identity.

entities.name: RpcMgmtEnableIdleCleanup
entities.description: Enables RPC to close idle resources on clients, such as network connections.

entities.name: RpcMgmtEpEltInqBegin
entities.description: Creates a query context for examining server address information stored in the endpoint mapper. Using InquiryType and VersOption parameters, the application can specify which endpoint map elements to return from subsequent RpcMgmtEpEltInqNext calls: all elements, elements with specified interface identifier, elements with specified object UUID, or elements with both specified interface identifier and object UUID. Must be called before RpcMgmtEpEltInqNext. After examining endpoint map elements, the application should call RpcMgmtEpEltInqDone to free resources.

entities.name: RpcMgmtEpEltInqDone
entities.description: Terminates an RPC endpoint element inquiry. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server [desktop apps only]. Header: rpcdce.h (include Rpc.h). Library: Rpcrt4.lib. DLL: Rpcrt4.dll

entities.name: RpcMgmtEpEltInqNext
entities.description: Retrieves an element from the endpoint map. The selected element depends on the inquiry context, which is determined by the InquiryType parameter of the RpcMgmtEpEltInqBegin function that returned the InquiryContext. Applications can view all selected endpoint map elements by repeatedly calling RpcMgmtEpEltInqNext. After all elements have been viewed, this function returns RPC_X_NO_MORE_ENTRIES status. The returned elements are unordered. When corresponding parameters are non-NULL, the RPC runtime library allocates binding and annotation memory for each call. The application is responsible for calling RpcBindingFree for each returned binding.

entities.name: RpcMgmtEpEltInqNextW
entities.description: Unicode version of RPC management function that returns an element from endpoint mapping (rpcdce.h)

entities.name: RpcMgmtEpUnregister
entities.description: 从终结点映射中注销元素。管理程序调用此函数以删除不再可用的服务器地址，或删除支持不再提供的对象的服务器地址。

entities.name: RpcMgmtInqComTimeout
entities.description: Retrieves the communication timeout for a binding handle.

entities.name: RpcMgmtInqDefaultProtectLevel
entities.description: Returns the default authentication level for the authentication service.

entities.name: RpcMgmtInqIfIds
entities.description: 函数返回一个矢量，其中包含服务器提供的接口的标识符。

entities.name: RpcMgmtInqServerPrincName
entities.description: Retrieves the server principal name for a server binding handle. Available in both ANSI (RpcMgmtInqServerPrincNameA) and Unicode (RpcMgmtInqServerPrincNameW) variants.

entities.name: rpcMgmtInqServerPrincNameW
entities.description: Unicode version function (rpcdce.h) that returns the server's principal name.

entities.name: RpcMgmtInqStats
entities.description: Retrieves RPC runtime statistics.

entities.name: RpcMgmtIsServerListening
entities.description: Determines if a server is listening for remote procedure calls. Note: This function only returns correct results for non-auto-listening interfaces. If the server application is auto-listening, it may return RPC_SERVER_NOT_LISTENING even when the server is actually listening.
entities.remarks: Applications call this function to check if a server specified in the Binding parameter is listening for RPCs. Returns RPC_S_OK if the server has called RpcServerListen. The server must be actively listening for RPCs for this function to succeed.

entities.name: RpcMgmtSetAuthorizationFn
entities.description: Sets an authorization function for RPC management operations. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server [desktop apps only].

entities.name: RpcMgmtSetCancelTimeout
entities.description: Sets the minimum amount of time to wait for cancellation propagation before timing out.

entities.name: RpcMgmtSetComTimeout
entities.description: Sets the communication timeout for a remote procedure call (RPC) binding handle. [Windows 2000 Professional/Server desktop apps only]

entities.name: RpcMgmtSetServerStackSize
entities.description: 设置RPC服务器线程的堆栈大小。调用此函数是可选的，如果不调用则使用可执行映像的默认线程堆栈大小。

entities.name: RpcMgmtStatsVectorFree
entities.description: Frees the statistics vector allocated by RpcMgmtInqStats. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server [desktop apps only]. Header: rpcdce.h (include Rpc.h)

entities.name: RpcMgmtStopServerListening
entities.description: Stops server from listening for remote procedure calls. Minimum supported client: Windows 2000 Professional [Desktop apps only]. Minimum supported server: Windows 2000 Server [Desktop apps only]. Header: rpcdce.h (include Rpc.h). Library: Rpcrt4.lib. DLL: Rpcrt4.dll.

entities.name: RpcMgmtWaitServerListen
entities.description: Waits for server listen operations typically associated with RpcServerListen.

entities.name: RpcNetworkInqProtseqs
entities.description: Queries the protocol sequences supported by the RPC runtime. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional [desktop apps only] and Windows 2000 Server [desktop apps only]. Header: rpcdce.h (include Rpc.h). Library: Rpcrt4.lib. DLL: Rpcrt4.dll.

entities.name: rpcNetworkInqProtseqsW
entities.description: Unicode version of the function that returns all protocol sequences supported by the RPC runtime library and operating system. (rpcdce.h)

entities.name: RpcNetworkIsProtseqValid
entities.description: Determines if a protocol sequence is valid. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional [desktop apps only] and Windows 2000 Server [desktop apps only]. Header: rpcdce.h (include Rpc.h). Library: Rpcrt4.lib. DLL: Rpcrt4.dll.

entities.name: RpcNetworkIsProtseqValidW
entities.description: Unicode函数 (rpcdce.h) 指示RPC运行时库和操作系统是否支持指定的协议序列。

entities.name: RPCNOTIFICATION_ROUTINE
entities.description: RPC notification callback routine. Signature: void RpcNotificationRoutine(_RPC_ASYNC_STATE *pAsync, void *Context)

entities.name: RpcNsBindingExport
entities.description: The RpcNsBindingExport function exports server binding information to the name service database. Before calling this function, the server must: 1) Register protocol sequences using RpcServerUseAllProtseqs or similar functions, 2) Obtain server bindings via RpcServerInqBindings (which provides the Binding parameter). Multiple exports to the same name service entry may cause duplicates.

entities.name: RpcNsBindingExportPnP
entities.description: Exports RPC binding handles to the name service database. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional [desktop apps only] and Windows 2000 Server [desktop apps only]. Header: rpcnsi.h (include Rpc.h). Import library: Rpcns4.lib. DLL: Rpcns4.dll.

entities.name: RpcNsBindingImportBegin
entities.description: Initiates the import of a binding handle from the name service database. The function communicates only with the name service database and not directly with the server. In Windows 2000, the RPC environment uses Active Directory as its name service database. The runtime environment performs searches in the following order: 1) Local cache, 2) Active Directory, 3) Broadcast request to all other directory services in the domain (only if no entry exists in Active Directory). The returned compatible binding handle always contains the object UUID.

entities.name: RpcNsBindingImportDone
entities.description: Completes the namespace binding import operation started by RpcNsBindingImportBegin. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server [desktop apps only]

entities.name: RpcNsBindingImportNext
entities.description: Retrieves the next compatible binding handle from a name service database. Client applications can use this binding handle to attempt remote procedure calls to servers. If unsuccessful, clients may call this function again to retrieve alternative binding handles. Returned binding handles are in arbitrary order.

entities.name: RpcNsBindingInqEntryName
entities.description: Retrieves the entry name associated with a binding handle. The function returns RPC_S_OK if successful, or an error code otherwise.

entities.name: rpcNsBindingInqEntryNameW
entities.description: Unicode version of RPC function (rpcdce.h) that retrieves the entry name from which a binding handle was created.

entities.name: RpcNsBindingLookupBegin
entities.description: 创建查找上下文，用于将客户端兼容的绑定句柄定位到提供指定接口和对象的服务器。在调用RpcNsBindingLookupNext之前，客户端应用程序必须先调用此函数来创建查找上下文。此函数的参数控制RpcNsBindingLookupNext函数的操作。在Windows 2000中，RPC环境使用Active Directory作为其名称服务数据库，运行时环境执行搜索的顺序如下：1) 在本地缓存中搜索；2) 如果未在本地缓存中找到条目，搜索该计算机的Active Directory；3) 如果未在本地计算机上找到条目，将广播请求发送到域中所有其他Active Directory服务。注意：如果Active Directory中存在该条目但没有关联信息，运行时环境不会发出广播请求。

entities.name: RpcNsBindingLookupDone
entities.description: 释放通过RpcNsBindingLookupBegin创建的查找上下文。客户端应用程序必须为每个创建的查找上下文调用此函数，无论RpcNsBindingLookupNext返回的状态或远程调用是否成功。

entities.name: RpcNsBindingLookupNext
entities.description: The RpcNsBindingLookupNext function communicates only with the name service database, not directly with servers. In Windows 2000, the RPC environment uses Active Directory as its name service database. The runtime environment performs searches in the following order: searches local cache, searches the computer's Active Directory if not found locally, and broadcasts requests to all other Active Directory services in the domain if not found on the local computer. Note that if the entry exists in Active Directory but has no associated information, the runtime environment does not issue this broadcast request. In successive calls, RpcNsBindingLookupNext traverses name service database entries, collecting client-compatible server binding handles from each entry. When Microsoft Active Directory is the name service database, RpcNsBindingLookupNext traverses the database only when the given entry name is null and the default entry in the registry is undefined or empty. Additionally, since mixed entries are not allowed in Active Directory, the function searches only for server entry names, not group or profile names.

return_value.description: Returns RPC_S_OK if successful, or an error code if the operation fails.

entities.name: RpcNsBindingSelect
entities.description: RpcNsBindingSelect function in Windows 2000 Professional/Server [desktop apps only]. Defined in rpcdce.h (include Rpc.h). Related to RPC_ENDPOINT_TEMPLATE structure.

entities.name: RpcNsBindingUnexport
entities.description: 函数允许服务器应用程序从名称服务数据库条目中删除资源的绑定句柄和对象UUID。服务器应用程序可以在单个调用RpcNsBindingUnexport中取消导出指定的接口和对象，也可以单独取消导出它们。只有与接口UUID匹配的绑定句柄和在IfSpec参数中找到的主要和次要接口版本号会被取消导出。使用RpcNsMgmtBindingUnexport函数可以删除接口的多个版本。在Windows 2000中，RPC运行时环境使用Active Directory作为其名称服务数据库，这意味着授权的未导出条目将从本地缓存和Active Directory中删除，而未授权的未导出将仅从本地缓存中删除。

entities.name: RpcNsBindingUnexportPnP
entities.description: Allows server applications to remove binding handles and object UUIDs compatible with Plug-and-Play resources from the name service database. Server applications can unexport specified interfaces and objects in a single call to RpcNsBindingUnexportPnP, or unexport them separately. Only binding handles matching the interface UUID will be removed.

entities.name: RpcNsEntryExpandName
entities.description: Expands a name service entry name. This function is supported by Active Directory (Unicode version).

entities.name: RpcNsEntryObjectInqBegin
entities.description: Begins an inquiry for RPC name service entry objects. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server [desktop apps only]. Requires rpcnsi.h header and links with Rpcns4.lib/Rpcns4.dll.

entities.name: RpcNsEntryObjectInqDone
entities.description: RpcNsEntryObjectInqDone function is available on Windows 2000 Professional [desktop apps only] and Windows 2000 Server [desktop apps only]. Header: rpcnsi.h (include Rpc.h). Library: Rpcns4.lib. DLL: Rpcns4.dll.

entities.name: RpcNsEntryObjectInqNext
entities.description: Returns one of the object UUIDs exported to the name-service database entry specified by the EntryName parameter in the RpcNsEntryObjectInqBegin function. Applications can view all exported object UUIDs by repeatedly calling RpcNsEntryObjectInqNext. After viewing all object UUIDs, this function returns RPC_S_NO_MORE_MEMBERS status code. The returned object UUIDs are unordered. The application must provide memory for the returned object UUID in the ObjUuid parameter. After viewing object UUIDs, the application must call RpcNsEntryObjectInqDone.

entities.name: RpcNsGroupDelete
entities.description:
函数从指定的名称服务数据库条目中删除组属性。既不删除指定的名称服务数据库条目，也不会删除组成员。

注意：Microsoft定位符不支持此DCE函数。Windows NT和Windows 2000支持使用此函数，但仅使用Cell Directory服务(CDS)。

entities.name: RpcNsGroupMbrAdd
entities.description: 将名称服务数据库条目名称添加为RPC组属性的成员。如果GroupName项不存在，RpcNsGroupMbrAdd尝试使用组属性创建条目，并添加由MemberName指定的组成员。在这种情况下，应用程序必须具有创建条目的权限。否则，具有必要权限的管理应用程序应在运行应用程序之前调用RpcNsMgmtEntryCreate来创建该条目。注意Windows 2000 Active Directory支持此函数。早期版本的Windows NT仅支持将此函数与Cell Directory服务(CDS)配合使用。

entities.name: RpcNsGroupMbrInqBegin
entities.description: 函数创建一个查询上下文，用于查看 RPC 组的成员。 在调用 RpcNsGroupMbrInqNext之前，应用程序必须先调用 RpcNsGroupMbrInqBegin 来创建查询上下文。 查看 RPC 组成员后，应用程序将调用 RpcNsGroupMbrInqDone 以删除查询上下文。 注意 Windows 2000 Active Directory 支持此函数。 早期版本的 Windows NT 仅支持 将此函数与 Cell Directory 服务（CDS）配合使用。 ７ 备注

entities.name: RpcNsGroupMbrInqDone
entities.description: 释放通过调用 RpcNsGroupMbrInqBegin 函数创建的查询上下文。应用程序在使用 RpcNsGroupMbrInqNext 函数查看 RPC 组成员后调用此函数。注意：Windows 2000 Active Directory 支持此函数，早期版本的 Windows NT 仅支持与单元格目录服务(CDS)配合使用。

entities.name: RpcNsGroupMbrInqNext
entities.description: 函数返回由 RpcNsGroupMbrInqBegin 中 GroupName 参数指定的 RPC 组的一个成员。应用程序可以通过重复调用 RpcNsGroupMbrInqNext 来查看 RPC 组的所有成员。查看所有组成员后，此函数将返回 RPC_S_NO_MORE_MEMBERS 状态代码。返回的组成员是无序的。每次调用 RpcNsGroupMbrInqNext 返回成员名称时，RPC 运行时库将为返回的 MemberName 分配内存。应用程序负责为每个返回的 MemberName 字符串调用 RpcStringFree。查看 RPC 组的成员后，应用程序必须调用 RpcNsGroupMbrInqDone 完成查询。

entities.name: RpcNsGroupMbrRemove
entities.description: Removes a member from a group in the RPC name service. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional [desktop apps only] and Windows 2000 Server [desktop apps only]. Header: rpcnsi.h (include Rpc.h). Import library: Rpcns4.lib. DLL: Rpcns4.dll.

entities.name: RpcNsMgmtBindingUnexport
entities.description: Allows management applications to remove from a name service database entry either: all binding handles for a specified interface UUID qualified by interface version numbers (major and minor), or one or more object UUID binding handles. Applications can unexport both interfaces and objects in a single call, or separately. Returns RPC_S_INTERFACE_NOT_FOUND if no bindings found for specified interface, and RPC_S_NOT_ALL_OBJS_UNEXPORTED if specified object UUIDs not found.

return_value.description: Returns RPC_S_OK on success, or error codes like RPC_S_INTERFACE_NOT_FOUND and RPC_S_NOT_ALL_OBJS_UNEXPORTED

entities.name: RpcNsMgmtEntryCreate
entities.description: 函数在名称服务数据库中创建一个条目。管理应用程序可以调用RpcNsMgmtEntryCreate来创建名称服务数据库条目，以供其他本身没有创建条目所需的名称服务数据库权限的应用程序使用。注意Windows 2000 Active Directory支持此函数。早期版本的Windows NT仅支持将此函数与Cell Directory服务(CDS)配合使用。

entities.name: RpcNsMgmtEntryDelete
entities.description: Deletes an entry from the name service database. Note: Creating and deleting entries repeatedly in client or server applications may cause performance issues in replicated name service databases.

entities.name: RpcNsMgmtEntryInqIfIds
entities.description: Returns a list of interfaces exported to a name service database entry. Also returns an interface identifier vector containing interfaces for binding handles exported by the server specified in EntryName. This function uses an expiration period of 0, causing immediate update of the local copy of name service data. Note: This function is not supported on Windows Vista and later operating systems.

entities.name: RpcNsMgmtHandleSetExpAge
entities.description: 为指定的名称服务句柄设置过期期限。过期期限是名称服务属性本地副本在需要更新前可存在的时间。默认全局过期期限为2小时，此函数可为特定句柄设置临时替代值。设置较小的值会导致频繁更新本地数据，可能影响性能。

entities.name: RpcNsMgmtInqExpAge
entities.description: Returns the expiration age used by the application. The expiration age is the time (in seconds) that a local copy of name service attribute data can exist before an application's request for the attribute requires updating the local copy. The RPC runtime library specifies a default expiration age of 2 hours when the application starts running. For applications, the default is global. The "next pointer" operation uses the expiration age (reading data from name service attributes). The next operation typically starts by looking up the local copy of attribute data requested by the application. If no local copy exists, the next operation creates one with fresh attribute data from the name service database. If a local copy already exists, the operation compares its actual age with the application's expiration age. If the actual age exceeds the expiration age, the operation automatically attempts to update the local copy with new attribute data. If the update fails, the old local data remains in place and the next operation fails. Applications should generally use only the default expiration age. However, for special cases, applications can override this by calling this function.

entities.name: RpcNsMgmtSetExpAge
entities.description: 修改应用程序的全局过期期限。过期期限是名称服务属性的本地数据副本在需要更新前存在的时间量。默认过期期限为两小时。通常应避免使用此函数而依赖默认值。该函数影响从名称服务属性读取数据的操作。

entities.name: RpcNsProfileDelete
entities.description: 函数从指定的名称服务项（ProfileName）中删除配置文件属性。 既 ProfileName 也没有删除每个配置文件元素中作为成员包含的条目名称。 注意 谨慎使用 RpcNsProfileDelete;删除配置文件可能会产生破坏配置文件层次结构的不需 要的效果。 注意 Microsoft定位符不支持此 DCE 函数。 Windows NT 和 Windows 2000 仅支持将此函 数与 Cell Directory 服务（CDS）配合使用。 ７ 备注

entities.name: RpcNsProfileEltAdd
entities.description: Adds an element to the profile attribute of a name-service entry specified by ProfileName. If the ProfileName entry does not exist, RpcNsProfileEltAdd attempts to create the entry with a profile attribute and add the profile element specified by the IfId, MemberName, Priority, and Annotation parameters. In this case, the application must have permission to create the entry. Otherwise, an administrative application with the necessary permissions should call RpcNsMgmtEntryCreate to create the entry before running the application. If an element with the specified member name and interface identifier already exists in the profile, RpcNsProfileEltAdd updates the element's priority and annotation string with the values provided in the Priority and Annotation parameters. Note: This function is supported by Windows 2000 Active Directory. Earlier versions of Windows NT only support using this function with the Cell Directory Service (CDS).

entities.name: RpcNsProfileEltInqBegin
entities.description: Function creates a query context for examining elements in a profile. Using the InquiryType parameter, the application specifies which profile elements to return from subsequent RpcNsProfileEltInqNext calls: default elements, all elements, elements with specified interface ID, elements with specified member name, or elements with both specified interface ID and member name. Before calling RpcNsProfileEltInqNext, the application must first call RpcNsProfileEltInqBegin to create the query context. After examining profile elements, the application should call RpcNsProfileEltInqDone.

entities.name: RpcNsProfileEltInqDone
entities.description: 释放通过调用 RpcNsProfileEltInqBegin 创建的查询上下文。应用程序在使用 RpcNsProfileEltInqNext 函数查看配置文件元素后调用此函数。注意：Windows 2000 Active Directory 支持此功能，早期版本的 Windows NT 仅支持将此函数与单元格目录服务(CDS)配合使用。

entities.name: RpcNsProfileEltInqNext
entities.description: Returns all components of a profile element (interface ID, member name, priority, annotation string). Applications can view all selected profile entries by repeatedly calling RpcNsProfileEltInqNext. After viewing all elements, this function returns RPC_S_NO_MORE_ELEMENTS status code. The returned elements are unordered. For each profile element returned, the RPC runtime library allocates memory for member names and annotation strings. The application must call RpcStringFree to free this memory.

entities.name: RpcNsProfileEltRemove
entities.description: 从ProfileName条目中的配置文件属性中删除配置文件元素。此函数需要完全匹配MemberName和IfId参数来删除配置文件元素。不会删除作为配置文件元素中的成员包含的条目(MemberName)。注意：谨慎使用RpcNsProfileEltRemove，从配置文件中删除元素可能会破坏配置文件层次结构。Windows 2000 Active Directory支持此函数。早期版本的Windows NT仅支持将此函数与Cell Directory服务(CDS)配合使用。

entities.name: RpcObjectInqType
entities.description: Queries the type of an RPC object.

entities.name: RpcObjectSetInqFn
entities.description: Registers an object inquiry function for RPC. A null value disables any previously registered object inquiry function.

entities.name: RpcObjectSetType
entities.description: Sets the type of an RPC object.

entities.name: RpcProtseqVectorFree
entities.description: 释放RPC协议序列向量及其包含的所有协议序列

entities.name: RpcProtseqVectorFreeW
entities.description: Unicode函数 (rpcdce.h) 释放矢量和矢量本身中包含的协议序列。

entities.name: RpcRevertContainerImpersonation
entities.description: Reverts container impersonation after completing tasks that require client impersonation. This function is typically called after RpcImpersonateClient to end the impersonation and restore the original security context.

entities.name: RpcRevertToSelfEx
entities.description: 结束模拟并重新建立调用线程的安全标识。当服务器线程完成模拟客户端操作后，应调用此函数恢复原始安全上下文。通常与RpcImpersonateClient配合使用。

entities.name: RpcServerCompleteSecurityCallback
entities.description: Completes an asynchronous security callback operation initiated by RpcServerRegisterAuthInfo.

entities.name: RpcServerInqBindings
entities.description: Retrieves a complete list of binding handles that can receive remote procedure calls. For more information, see Server-side Bindings. For a list of protocol sequences supported by Microsoft RPC, see String Bindings. To register all protocol sequences from an IDL file, servers call RpcServerUseAllProtseqsIf.

entities.name: RpcServerInqCallAttributes
entities.description: Retrieves security level information or attempts to impersonate a client using RpcImpersonateClient. Can specify RPC_IF_ALLOW_SECURE_ONLY flag to reject unauthenticated calls. When a server application specifies a security callback function (in IfCallback), the RPC runtime automatically rejects calls to that interface without authentication. The runtime also tracks interfaces used by each client. When a client makes an RPC to an interface not previously used in the current session, the security callback is invoked. The RPC_IF_ALLOW_CALLBACKS_WITH_NO_AUTH flag prevents automatic rejection of unauthenticated clients. Note that NULL security session calls may have authentication info even from anonymous clients. The RPC_IF_ALLOW_SECURE_ONLY flag (Windows XP+) specifically rejects NULL session calls.

entities.name: RpcServerInqDefaultPrincName
entities.description: RpcServerInqDefaultPrincName function (rpcdce.h) retrieves the default principal name for a given authentication service.

entities.name: RpcServerInqDefaultPrincNameW
entities.description: Unicode函数 (rpcdce.h) 获取给定身份验证服务的默认主体名称。

entities.name: RpcServerInqIf

entities.name: RpcServerInterfaceGroupActivate
entities.description: Activates an RPC server interface group. Minimum supported client: Windows 8 [desktop apps only]. Minimum supported server: Windows Server 2012 [desktop apps only]. Header: rpcdce.h (include Rpc.h). Library: Rpcrt4.lib. DLL: Rpcrt4.dll.

entities.name: RpcServerInterfaceGroupClose
entities.description: 函数用于释放RPC服务器接口组资源

entities.name: RpcServerInterfaceGroupCreate
entities.description: Creates an RPC interface group. [in] RPC_INTERFACE_GROUP - defines the interface group whose idle state has changed. [in] IdleCallbackContext - user-defined context provided when creating the interface group. [in] IsGroupIdle - TRUE if the interface group just became idle, FALSE if it was previously idle but has received new activity.

return_value.description: Returns RPC_S_OK if successful, or an error code on failure.

entities.remarks: 当服务器注册接口组时，它会提供指向空闲回调函数的指针，RPC 将通过该函数在接口组的空闲状态发生更改时通知应用程序。 服务器应用程序可以使用此回调尝试在接口组处于空闲状态时将其停用。 不得从此回调调用 RpcServerInterfaceGroupClose，否则可能会出现死锁。 请注意，RPC 服务器活动并不总是对服务器应用程序可见。 在某些情况下，即使长时间没有调度任何调用，也只需让客户端与服务器建立开放连接即可使其保持活动状态。 服务器应用程序 不得依赖于声明组处于空闲状态的 RPC 运行时与上次调度调用后的时间之间的任何关联。

entities.name: RpcServerListen
entities.description: Starts listening for remote procedure calls. The function does not affect interfaces or calls to RpcServerUnregisterIf with IfSpec set to NULL. Specifying a security callback function in IfCallback allows server applications to restrict access to their interfaces on a per-client basis. By default, security is optional; the server runtime will dispatch unsecured calls even if the server has called RpcServerRegisterAuthInfo. If the server wants to accept only authenticated clients, the interface callback function must enforce this.

entities.name: RpcServerRegisterAuthInfo
entities.description: Registers authentication information with the RPC server. The syntax and content of the returned name are defined by the authentication service in use. For SCHANNEL SSP, the principal name is in Microsoft standard (msstd) format. Specifying a null value prevents RpcBindingInqAuthClient from returning the ServerPrincName parameter. In this case, the application should not call RpcStringFree function.

return_value.description: Returns RPC_S_OK if successful, or an error code otherwise.

entities.remarks: The authorization key retrieval function specifies the address of a routine provided by the server application that returns encryption keys.

entities.name: RpcServerRegisterAuthInfoW
entities.description: Registers authentication information with the RPC runtime library (Unicode version).

entities.name: RpcServerRegisterIf
entities.description: Registers an interface with the RPC runtime library. Windows 2000 Professional [desktop apps only] Windows 2000 Server [desktop apps only] Header: rpcdce.h (include Rpc.h) Library: Rpcrt4.lib DLL: Rpcrt4.dll

entities.name: RpcServerRegisterIf2
entities.description: 扩展了RpcServerRegisterIf函数的参数和功能，增加了自动侦听接口和安全回调函数的支持。服务器应用程序调用此函数注册接口时需要提供：接口规范(MIDL生成的数据结构)、管理器类型UUID和管理器EPV。RPC_IF_AUTOLISTEN标志使接口成为自动侦听接口，注册后立即开始侦听调用。安全回调函数允许基于客户端限制接口访问。
entities.return_value: 成功后返回RPC_S_OK，失败返回错误代码。

entities.name: RpcServerRegisterIf3
entities.description: 扩展了RpcServerRegisterIf2函数的功能，增加了安全描述符参数来控制RPC接口访问权限。当同时指定SecurityDescriptor和IfCallbackFn时，会先检查安全描述符，通过后再调用回调函数。如果SecurityDescriptor为NULL或使用旧版注册函数，则使用默认安全描述符：非AppContainer进程默认允许普通进程访问(包括低完整性进程)，但拒绝所有AppContainer访问；AppContainer进程默认拒绝其他AppContainer访问。

entities.name: RpcServerRegisterIfEx
entities.description: Registers an interface with the RPC runtime library, allowing the server to receive remote procedure calls. Compared to RpcServerRegisterIf, this function adds the ability to register auto-listen interfaces and specify a security callback function. Key parameters include: interface specification (MIDL-generated data structure), manager type UUID and manager EPV (determines which manager routine executes when receiving calls). When RPC_IF_AUTOLISTEN flag is specified, the runtime immediately starts listening for calls. Security callback functions allow restricting interface access per client. Note: by default security is optional - to enforce authenticated clients, the callback must explicitly check security.

entities.name: RpcServerUnregisterIf
entities.description: Unregisters an interface previously registered with RpcServerRegisterIf.

entities.name: RpcServerUnregisterIfEx
entities.description: Unregisters an interface from the RPC server runtime library after waiting for all calls on that interface to complete. Provides all functionality of RpcServerUnregisterIf and additionally unregisters all context handles registered by the interface. The interface must use strict_context_handle attribute.

entities.name: RpcServerUseAllProtseqs
entities.description: Registers all supported protocol sequences with the RPC runtime library. A server that uses RpcServerUseAllProtseqs or RpcServerUseProtseq must also register with the local endpoint mapper database by calling RpcEpRegister or RpcEpRegisterNoReplace. The server does not need to export any of its interfaces to the name service database.

entities.name: RpcServerUseAllProtseqsEx
entities.description: Registers all supported protocol sequences with the RPC runtime library, with additional policy controls for port allocation and NIC binding. The Policy parameter (of type RPC_POLICY) allows restricting dynamic port allocation and selective binding to specified NICs. Setting NICFlags to zero makes this function equivalent to RpcServerUseAllProtseqs. Note: Policy flags only affect ncacn_ip_tcp and ncadg_ip_udp protocol sequences. Does not support: ncacn_nb_nb, ncacn_nb_tcp, ncacn_nb_ipx, ncadg_mq, ncacn_at_dsp, ncacn_http.

entities.name: RpcServerUseAllProtseqsIf
entities.description: Instructs the RPC runtime library to use all protocol sequences specified in the interface specification for receiving remote procedure calls.

entities.name: RpcServerUseAllProtseqsIfEx
entities.description: Registers all protocol sequences and associated endpoint addresses from the IDL file with the RPC runtime library. The main difference from RpcServerUseAllProtseqsIf is the 'Policy' field which allows restricting dynamic port allocation and selective binding to NICs. When using ncacn_ip_tcp or ncadg_ip_udp protocol sequences, the NICFlags in RPC_POLICY structure controls binding behavior. For other protocols, these values are ignored. Note: Does not listen to certain protocol sequences like ncacn_nb_nb, ncacn_nb_tcp, etc. - these must be registered individually. The MaxCalls parameter is only a hint and may be overridden by the RPC runtime.

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseq
entities.description: Registers a protocol sequence that the RPC server will use to receive remote procedure calls. The returned binding vector may contain binding handles with dynamic endpoints or known endpoints, depending on which function the server application calls. Servers use the binding handle vector to export to name services, register in the local endpoint mapper database, or convert to string bindings. If no binding handles are available (no registered protocol sequences), this routine returns RPC_S_NO_BINDINGS status code and NULL BindingVector parameter value.

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqEp
entities.description: Registers a protocol sequence and endpoint combination with the RPC runtime library. If the server also exports to the name service database, it will use the same IfSpec, BindingVector and UuidVector values as when calling RpcNsBindingExport. When using protocol sequences without specifying endpoints, the RPC runtime automatically generates dynamic endpoints.

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqEpEx
entities.description: Registers a protocol sequence with the RPC runtime library, including endpoint address information. Similar to RpcServerUseProtseqEp but with additional Policy parameter for setting specific policies on the endpoint. When NICFlags field of RPC_POLICY structure is set to zero and used with ncacn_ip_tcp or ncadg_ip_udp transports, this function behaves identically to RpcServerUseProtseqEp. Server applications must register at least one protocol sequence to receive remote procedure calls. Multiple calls can register additional sequences and endpoints. For each registered protocol sequence, the RPC runtime creates one or more endpoints for receiving calls. Note that MaxCalls parameter is only a hint - actual value may be overridden by RPC runtime or Windows sockets provider (e.g., limited to 5 on Windows XP/2000 Pro). Applications should provide reasonable values to avoid memory issues or TCP connection problems.

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqEpExW
entities.description: Unicode函数(rpcdce.h)告知RPC运行时库使用指定的协议序列和终结点来接收远程过程调用。

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqEpW
entities.description: Unicode函数 (rpcdce.h) 指示RPC运行时库使用指定的协议序列和终结点来接收远程过程调用。

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqEx
entities.description: 扩展了RpcServerUseProtseq的功能，增加了策略字段，允许限制动态端口的分配和多宿主计算机的网络接口卡选择性绑定。当使用ncacn_ip_tcp或ncadg_ip_udp协议序列时，策略字段的标志设置有效。服务器应用程序调用此函数向RPC运行时库注册协议序列，以便接收远程过程调用请求。可以为每个协议序列创建多个终结点。MaxCalls参数的值可能被RPC运行时或操作系统覆盖。

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqExW
entities.description: Unicode函数 (rpcdce.h) 告知RPC运行时库使用指定的协议序列来接收远程过程调用。

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqIf
entities.description: Registers the server's interface with the RPC runtime library and specifies the protocol sequences the server will use to receive remote procedure calls. If the server also exports to a name-service database, it should call RpcEpRegister with the same IfSpec, BindingVector and UuidVector values used in RpcNsBindingExport. When using protocol sequences without specified endpoints, the RPC runtime will automatically generate dynamic endpoints.

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqIfEx
entities.description: 扩展了RpcServerUseProtseqIf的参数和效果。区别在于Policy参数，它允许限制动态端口的端口分配，并允许多宿主计算机选择性地绑定到网络接口卡。将RPC_POLICY结构的NICFlags字段设置为0会使此API在功能上等效于原始RpcServerUseProtseqIf。服务器将根据系统注册表中的设置绑定到NIC。注意：策略字段中的标志设置仅在使用ncacn_ip_tcp或ncadg_ip_udp协议序列时有效；对于其他协议序列，RPC运行时会忽略这些值。服务器应用程序调用此函数向RPC运行时库注册协议序列，包含IDL文件中提供的终结点地址信息。服务器可以多次调用此函数注册其他协议序列。对于MaxCalls参数，应用程序提供的值只是一个提示，可能会被RPC运行时或Windows套接字提供程序重写。

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqIfExW
entities.description: Unicode函数 (rpcdce.h) 告知 RPC 运行时库使用接口规范中用于接收远程过程调用的指定协议序列和终结点。

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqIfW
entities.description: Unicode函数 (rpcdce.h) 告知RPC运行时库使用接口规范中指定的协议序列和终结点来接收远程过程调用。

entities.name: RpcServerUseProtseqW

entities.name: RpcSmAllocate
entities.description: Allocates memory when memory management is established by the application (not the stub). Applications must call RpcSmEnableAllocate to set up the memory management environment before calling this function. Returns a pointer to allocated memory on success, NULL on failure. Memory allocated by RpcSmAllocate is automatically freed when the stub establishes memory management. Applications can manually free this memory before returning to the stub by calling RpcSmFree. When application establishes memory management, it must explicitly free allocated memory using RpcSmFree or RpcSmDisableAllocate. Multiple threads can call RpcSmAllocate/RpcSmFree in stub memory management environment if they share the same stub memory management thread handle.

entities.name: RpcSmClientFree
entities.description: 释放从客户端存根分配和返回的内存。调用此函数的线程的内存管理句柄必须与进行RPC调用的线程的句柄匹配。使用RpcSmGetThreadHandle和RpcSmSetThreadHandle将句柄从线程传递到线程。

entities.name: RpcSmDestroyClientContext

entities.name: RpcSmDisableAllocate
entities.description: Disables the RPC stub memory allocator. This function is used to disable the memory allocator previously enabled by RpcSmEnableAllocate.

entities.name: RpcSmEnableAllocate
entities.description: Enables the use of the RPC stub memory allocator.

entities.name: RpcSmGetThreadHandle

entities.name: RpcSmSetClientAllocFree

entities.name: RpcSmSetThreadHandle
entities.description: Sets the thread handle for RPC server management. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server editions. Header: rpcndr.h (include Rpc.h), "Library": Rpcrt4.lib, "DLL": Rpcrt4.dll.

entities.name: RpcSmSwapClientAllocFree
entities.description: Exchanges the client stub's memory allocation and deallocation mechanisms with the client-provided memory allocation and deallocation mechanisms.

entities.name: RpcSsAllocate
entities.description: Allows applications to allocate memory within RPC stub memory management functionality. Before calling RpcSsAllocate, a memory management environment must be established. For memory management called within stubs, the stub itself typically establishes the necessary environment. When allocating memory not called from a stub, applications must call RpcSsEnableAllocate to establish the required memory management environment. If successful, returns a pointer to the allocated memory; otherwise, raises an exception.

return_value.description: Pointer to the allocated memory if successful; raises an exception otherwise.

entities.name: RpcSsContextLockExclusive
entities.description: Acquires an exclusive lock on an RPC context handle. If the function takes multiple [in] context handles, RPC provides the context handle itself to the manager routine, meaning the handle may not be unique. In such cases, RPC performs this function on the first context handle with the given value. In shared mode, the method should not modify the context handle. Calling RpcSsContextLockExclusive does not remove reader locks on the specified context handle, ensuring context handles remain unchanged for applications operating in shared mode. If two threads simultaneously attempt to acquire an exclusive lock on the same context handle via RpcSsContextLockExclusive, one thread receives RPC_S_OK while the other receives ERROR_MORE_WRITES. The thread receiving ERROR_MORE_WRITES loses its reader lock on the context handle upon return. Callers receiving ERROR_MORE_WRITES must not assume the context handle still exists as it may have been destroyed. Asynchronous calls must not use RpcSsContextLockExclusive on the same call object from multiple threads simultaneously.

entities.name: RpcSsContextLockShared
entities.description: Locks a context handle in shared mode. When a function takes multiple [in] context handles, RPC provides the context handle itself to manager routines, meaning the handle may not be unique. In such cases, RPC performs this function on the first context handle with the given value. In shared mode, the method should not modify the context handle. Calling RpcSsContextLockShared does not remove writer locks on the specified context handle, ensuring it cannot be changed by another thread. Asynchronous calls must not use RpcSsContextLockShared on the same call object from multiple threads simultaneously.

entities.name: RpcSsDestroyClientContext
entities.description: Destroys a client context handle in RPC applications. Supported from Windows 2000 Professional/Server onwards. Header: rpcndr.h (include Rpc.h), "Library": Rpcrt4.lib, "DLL": Rpcrt4.dll

parameters.name: ContextHandle
parameters.description: 要销毁的上下文句柄。 在 RpcSsDestroyClientContext 返回之前，句柄设置为 NULL。

entities.remarks: 客户端应用程序使用 RpcSsDestroyClientContext 来回收用于在客户端上维护上下文句柄的内存 资源。 当 ContextHandle 不再有效时，例如发生通信故障且服务器不再可用时，将使用此函数。 上下文句柄设置为 NULL。 RpcSsDestroyClientContext 函数提供与

entities.name: RpcSsDisableAllocate
entities.description: Disables memory allocation tracking in RPC stub memory management.

entities.name: RpcSsDontSerializeContext
entities.description: Prevents the RPC runtime from serializing calls to the same context handle, allowing multiple calls to be dispatched concurrently. Note: This does not completely disable serialization - context cleanup routines will still wait for pending requests. State changes to the context handle must still be serialized. Recommended to call before processing RPC calls. Warning: This setting is irreversible for the process lifetime.

entities.name: RpcSsEnableAllocate
entities.description: Enables the RPC stub memory management allocator (rpcndr.h)

entities.name: RpcSsFree
entities.description: 释放由 RpcSsAllocate 或 RpcSmAllocate 分配的内存。

parameters.name: NodeToFree
parameters.description: 指向 RpcSsAllocate 或 RpcSmAllocate 分配的内存的指针。

entities.remarks: 应用程序使用 RpcSsFree 释放使用 RpcSsAllocate 分配的内存。在存根为环境分配内存的情况下，RpcSsFree 也可用于释放内存。调用 RpcSsFree 的线程的句柄必须与通过调用 RpcSsAllocate 分配内存的线程的句柄匹配。使用 RpcSsGetThreadHandle 和 RpcSsSetThreadHandle 将句柄从线程传递到线程。

entities.name: RpcSsGetThreadHandle
entities.description: 获取当前线程的内存管理环境句柄。生成的线程可以使用该句柄通过RpcSsSetThreadHandle设置相同的环境。通常在服务器管理器创建新线程前调用此函数。线程也可调用这对函数来保存和恢复其内存管理环境。注意：RpcSsGetThreadHandle可能引发异常。

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: 调用 RpcSmGetThreadHandle 返回的线程句柄。

entities.name: RpcSsSetClientAllocFree
entities.description: Sets the client-side memory allocation and deallocation routines for RPC stubs. Note: RpcUserFree is deprecated and may be altered or unavailable in future releases.

return_value.description: This function does not return a value.

requirements.min_client: Windows XP [桌面应用 | UWP 应用]
requirements.min_server: Windows Server 2003 [桌面应用 | UWP 应用]

entities.name: RpcSsSetThreadHandle
entities.description: Windows 2000及以上版本可用。该函数用于为存根内存管理环境设置线程句柄。头文件：rpcndr.h (包括Rpc.h)，库：Rpcrt4.lib，DLL：Rpcrt4.dll

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: 调用 RpcSsGetThreadHandle 返回的线程句柄。

entities.remarks: 应用程序调用 RpcSsSetThreadHandle 来为存根内存管理环境设置线程句柄。 用于管理存根内存管理环境的内存的线程调用 RpcSsGetThreadHandle 来获取其内存环境的句柄。 这样，使用此句柄调用 RpcSsSetThreadHandle 的另一个线程就可以使用相同的内存管理环境。 调用 RpcSsAllocate 和 RpcSsFree 的多个线程必须使用同一线程句柄来管理相同的内存。 在生成新线程来管理同一内存之前，建立内存管理环境的线程 (父线程) 调用 RpcSsGetThreadHandle 以获取此环境的线程句柄。 然后，生成的线程使用父线程提供的句柄调用 RpcSsSetThreadHandle 。 通常，由服务器管理器过程生成的线程调用 RpcSsSetThreadHandle。 存根为管理器过程设置内存管理环境，管理器调用 RpcSsGetThreadHandle 以获取线程句柄。 然后，每个生成的线程调用 RpcSsGetThreadHandle 来访问管理器的内存管理环境。 线程还可以调用 RpcSsGetThreadHandle 和 RpcSsSetThreadHandle 来保存和还原其内存管理环境。 注意RpcSsSetThreadHandle 例程引发异常，而 RpcSmSetThreadHandle 例程返回错误代码。

entities.name: RpcSsSwapClientAllocFree

members.name: Version
members.description: 正在使用的 RPC_SECURITY_QOS 结构的版本。 本主题介绍 RPC_SECURITY_QOS 结构的版本 2。 有关其他版本，请参阅 RPC_SECURITY_QOS、 RPC_SECURITY_QOS_V3、

entities.remarks: 以下列表定义了各种 Windows 操作系统上 QOS 版本的可用性： 版本 1：Windows 2000 及更高版本。 版本 2：Windows XP with Service Pack 1 (SP1) 及更高版本。版本 3：Windows Server 2003 及更高版本。 版本 4：Windows Vista 及更高版本。版本 5：Windows 8 及更高版本。 Windows 版本也支持下层版本。 例如，Windows Server 2003 支持版本 3，但也支持版本 1 和 2。 客户端安全功能 RpcBindingInqAuthInfoEx 和 RpcBindingSetAuthInfo 使用 RPC_SECURITY_QOS 结构来查询或设置绑定句柄的服务质量。 RPC 支持RPC_C_QOS_CAPABILITIES_LOCAL_MA_HINT提示 (在 Windows XP 和早期客户端版本上不受支持，在 Windows 2000 和早期服务器版本) 上不受支持。 仅当使用动态终结点和相互身份验证时，才使用此提示。 此外， ncadg_ 协议序列不支持它。 如果此标志用于 ncadg_ 协议序列，或者不使用相互身份验证，则会从 RpcBindingSetAuthInfoEx 函数调用返回RPC_S_INVALID_ARG。 此标志旨在防止拒绝服务攻击。 使用此标志会强制 RPC 运行时仅向由 ServerPrincName 或 Sid 成员中指定的主体注册的终结点请求终结点映射器。 这可以防止本地计算机上的攻击者尝试欺骗 RPC 客户端连接到它在终结点映射器中注册的欺骗终结点。 请注意，由于攻击仅是本地 (（例如来自具有许多用户) 的终端服务器计算机），因此标志也仅适用于本地进行的 RPC 调用。 注意 某些安全提供程序（如 Kerberos）支持委派模拟类型。 在支持委派模拟类型的 Windows 版本中，如果客户端已请求委派，但安全提供程序无法提供委派，则调用将失败并PRC_S_SEC_PKG_ERROR，除非指定了

parameters.name: EpBinding
parameters.description: 要注销其终结点映射元素的主机。 若要从调用应用程序所在的同一主机中删除元素，应用程序将值指定为 NULL。 若要从另一个主机中删除元素，应用程序为驻留在该主机上的任何服务器指定服务器绑定句柄。 请注意，应用程序可以指定它用于进行其他远程过程调用的相同绑定句 柄。 IfId 要从终结点映射中删除的接口标识符。 Binding 要删除的绑定句柄。 ObjectUuid 要删除的可选对象 UUID。 值 NULL 表示没有要删除的对象 UUID。

entities.remarks: The interface identification is a subset of the data contained in the interface specification structure. Routines that require the interface identification structure use the RPC_IF_ID data type.

entities.name: RPC_SECURITY_QOS
entities.description: Defines the quality of service settings for RPC security. This structure is used with RpcBindingSetAuthInfoEx and RpcBindingInqAuthInfoEx functions.

parameters.name: Binding
parameters.description: 设置身份验证和授权信息的服务器绑定句柄。 ServerPrincName 指向由 绑定引用的服务器的预期主体名称的指针。 名称和语法的内容由正在使用的身份验证服务定义。 注意 有关 SSP 允许的目标名称集，请参阅 InitializeSecurityContext 文档中的注释。

entities.remarks: 如果此结构未传递给 RpcBindingCreate（即 RpcBindingCreate 的 Security 参数设置为 NULL），则假定采用以下默认安全行为： 对于协议序列 ncalrpc (本地 RPC) ，RPC 将使用传输级安全性。 这意味着 RPC 将使用 Windows 内核提供的安全机制来提供安全性，而 RPC 不会对服务器进行身份验证，因为它使用当前线程标识进行连接。 在这种情况下，标识跟踪是静态的，模拟类型设置为“模拟”，身份验证级别设置为“隐私”。 对于协议序列ncacn_np，RPC 还将使用传输级安全性。 如果调用是远程的，则 RPC 使用 Windows 文件系统重定向程序提供的安全机制，并且没有相互身份验证。 在 这种情况下，标识是当前线程标识，标识跟踪状态为静态，模拟类型设置为“模拟”，身份验证级别由远程计算机的策略确定。 如果调用是本地的，则 RPC 使用命名管道文件系统 (NPFS) 提供的安全机制，并且也没有相互身份验证。 在这种情况下，标识是当前线程标识或通过服务器的“net use”命令建立的任何标识。 标识跟踪状态为动态，模拟类型设置为“模拟”，身份验证级别设置为“隐私”。 对于ncacn_ip_tcp、ncacn_ip_udp和ncacn_http的协议序列，当 Security 设置为 NULL 时，不使用任何安全性。 服务器不会执行模拟，所有数据都将以明文形式发送。 若要为数据提供最大保护，应用程序必须始终提供安全数据。 下表汇总了 RpcBindingCreate 的 Security 参数设置为 NULL 时不同协议序列的默认安全设置。 默认安全设置 安全机制“身份验证 级别” 相互身份验证？模拟类型标识跟踪类型 仅有效？呼叫标识 ncalrpc Windows 内 核隐私 否

parameters.name: IfSpec
parameters.description: 用于向本地终结点映射数据库注册的接口。 BindingVector 指向绑定句柄向量的指针，服务器可通过该向量接收远程过程调用。 UuidVector 指向服务器提供的对象 UUID 矢量的指针。 服务器应用程序构造此向量。null 参数值指示没有 要注册的对象 UUID。 Annotation 指向应用于添加到本地终结点映射数据库的每个跨积元素的字符串注释的指针。 字符串长度最多为 64 个字符，包括 null 终止字符。 如果没有批注字符串，请指定 null 值或以 null 结尾的字符串 (“\0”) 。 注释字符串仅由应用程序用于信息。 RPC 不使用此字符串来确定客户端与哪个服务器实例通 信，也不用于枚举终结点映射数据库中的元素。

entities.remarks: UUID 向量包含一个计数成员，其中包含向量中的 UUID总数，后跟指向 UUID的指针数组。 应用程序构造 一个 UUID 向量，以包含要从名称服务导出或未导出的对象 UUID。

entities.description: 异步操作完成时发布通知消息。 这些标志与 DCE 管道一起使用，这些管道允许应用程序在多个块中发送或接收数据。 程序可以发送连续数据流，也可以等待每个块传输，然后再发送下一个块。 如果不等待， RPC 运行时库将缓冲输出，直到可以发送。 数据传输完成后，RPC 库会向应用程序发送通知。 如果应用程序指定RPC_C_NOTIFY_ON_SEND_COMPLETE标志，则 RPC 库在完成 每个发送操作后向其发送 RPC_NOTIFICATION_TYPES 枚举的成员。 StubInfo 保留供存根使用。 请勿使用此成员。 UserInfo 将此成员用于要在此结构中跟踪的任何特定于应用程序的信息。 RuntimeInfo 保留供 RPC 运行时环境使用。 请勿使用此成员。 Event 发生的事件的类型。 RPC 运行时环境将此字段设置为

entities.remarks: 绑定向量包含 count 成员 (Count) ，后跟 binding-handle (BindingH) 元素的数组。当服务器应用程序注册协议序列时，RPC 运行时库会创建绑定句柄。 为了获取绑定向量，服务器应用程序调用 RpcServerInqBindings。 客户端应用程序通过调用 RpcNsBindingLookupNext 从名称服务数据库获取兼容服务器的绑定矢量。 在这两个例程中，RPC 运行时库为绑定向量分配内存。 应用程序调用 RpcBindingVectorFree 以释放绑定向量。 若要从向量中删除单个绑定句柄，应用程序必须将向量中的值设置为 NULL。 将矢量元素设置为 NULL 时，应用程序必须： 释放单个绑定。 不更改 Count 的值。 调用 RpcBindingFree 允许应用程序释放向量中的所有绑定句柄。

members.name: Count

entities.name: RPC_C_HTTP_FLAG_USE_FIRST_AUTH_SCHEME
entities.description: 指示RPC使用SSL与RPC代理通信。设置后，RPC会选择AuthnSchemes数组中的第一个方案进行身份验证。如果RPC代理不支持该方案，调用将失败。未设置时，RPC客户端会查询代理支持的身份验证方案并选择一种。

entities.name: AuthenticationTarget

entities.name: RPC_C_HTTP_AUTHN_TARGET_SERVER

entities.name: ServerCertificateSubject
entities.description: Specifies the authentication method for RPC proxy (from HTTP perspective it's HTTP server). This is the most common value. For HTTP proxy authentication. This value is less common. Contains an optional string with expected server principal name.

entities.name: RpcCertGeneratePrincipalName
entities.description: Generates a principal name in the same format (see Principal Name for details). This member is only used when SSL is enabled. In this case, the generated principal name is checked against the server certificate. If they don't match, an error is returned. This allows clients to authenticate the RPC proxy.
entities.remarks: If TransportCredentials is NULL and the authentication scheme is NTLM, the credentials of the currently logged-on user are used. To avoid exposing user credentials via weak LM hashes, user login credentials are only used when one or both of these conditions are true: 1) The caller requests SSL and uses ServerCertificateSubject member (ensures credentials are protected). 2) lncompatibilitylevel key is set to 2 or higher (forces NTLM security provider to use strong NT hashes).

parameters.name: Context
parameters.description: 指向安全证书上下文的指针。 Flags 目前，此参数的唯一有效标志是RPC_C_FULL_CERT_CHAIN。 使用此标志会导致主体名称 以完整格式生成。 pBuffer 指向指针的指针。 RpcCertGeneratePrincipalName 函数将此设置为指向包含 主体名称的以 null 结尾的字符串。 返回值此函数不返回值。

entities.name: RPC_AUTH_IDENTITY_HANDLE
entities.description: Handle to authentication and authorization credentials for RPC calls. Used as a parameter in RPC functions like RpcBindingInqAuthInfo.

parameters.name: Binding
parameters.description: 从中返回身份验证和授权信息的服务器绑定句柄。 ServerPrincName 返回指向指向 绑定中引用的服务器的预期主体名称的指针。 返回的名称及其语法的内容由正在使用的身份验证服务定义。 指定 null 值以防止 RpcBindingInqAuthInfo 返回 ServerPrincName 参数。 在这种情况 下，应用程序不会调用 RpcStringFree 函数。 AuthnLevel 返回一个指针，该指针设置为用于使用 绑定进行远程过程调用的身份验证级别。 请参阅注释。 指定 null 值以防止函数返回 AuthnLevel 参数。 在 AuthnLevel 参数中返回的级别可能与调用 RpcBindingSetAuthInfo 函数时指定的级别不同。 当 RPC 运行时库不支持客户端指定的身份验证级别并自动升级到下一个更高的身 份验证级别时，会发生这种差异。 AuthnSvc 返回一个指针，该指针设置为为使用 绑定进行的远程过程调用指定的身份验证服务。 请参阅注释。 指定 null 值以防止 RpcBindingInqAuthInfo 返回 AuthnSvc 参数。 AuthIdentity 返回指向数据结构的指针，该句柄包含为使用 绑定进行的远程过程调用指定的客户端身份验证和授权凭据。 指定 null 值以防止 RpcBindingInqAuthInfo 返回 AuthIdentity 参数。 AuthzSvc 返回一个指针，该指针设置为客户端应用程序请求的授权服务，该服务对 绑定进行远程过程调用 请参阅注释。 指定 null 值以防止 RpcBindingInqAuthInfo 返回 AuthzSvc 参数。 注意 有关 RPC 支持的身份验证服务列表，请参阅 Authentication-Service 常量。

entities.name: ProxyCredentials

entities.name: RPC_IF_HANDLE
entities.description: RPC interface handle type that can be safely cast to client binding handle. Callback functions can pass this handle to RpcImpersonateClient or RpcBindingServerFromClient.

entities.name: RPC_MGR_EPV
entities.description: RPC manager entry point vector structure containing function pointers for RPC interface implementation

parameters.name: IfSpec
parameters.description: 返回其管理器 EPV 的接口。 MgrTypeUuid 指向返回其管理器 EPV 的管理器类型 UUID 的指针。 将参数值指定为 NULL (或 nil UUID) 表示返回已注册到 IfSpec 和 nil 管理器类型 UUID 的管理器 EPV。 MgrEpv 返回指向所请求接口的管理器 EPV 的指针。

entities.remarks: 服务器可以向 RPC 运行时库注册无限数量的接口。 注册使接口可用于使用与服务器的绑定句柄的客户端。 若要注册接口，服务器应用程序代码将调用 RpcServerRegisterIf。 对于服务器提供 的接口的每个实现，它必须注册一个单独的管理器 EPV。调用 RpcServerRegisterIf 时，服务器提供以下信息： 接口规范 接口规范是 MIDL 编译器生成的数据结构。 服务器使用 IfSpec 参数指定接口。管理器类型 UUID 和管理器 EPV 管理器类型 UUID 和管理器 EPV 确定服务器从客户端接收远程过程调用请求时执行哪个管理器例程。 服务器使用 MgrTypeUuid 和 MgrEpv 参数指定管理器类型 UUID 和 EPV。 请注意，指定非 nil 管理器类型 UUID 时，服务器还必须调用 RpcObjectSetType 函数来注册此非 nil 类型的对象。 如果服务器应用程序需要注册自动侦听接口或使用回调函数进行身份验证，请使用 RpcServerRegisterIfEx。

members.name: Version
members.description: 此字段是保留的，必须设置为 0。 IfSpec 用于定义要注册的接口的 MIDL 生成的结构。 MgrTypeUuid 指向要与 MgrEpv 关联的 UUID 的指针。 NULL 或 nil UUID 将 IfSpec 注册到 nil UUID。 MgrEpv 指向 RPC_MGR_EPV 结构的指针，该结构包含管理器例程的入口点矢量 (EPV) 。 如果 为 NULL，则使用 MIDL 生成的默认 EPV。 Flags 标志。 有关标志值的列表，请参阅 接口注册标志。 接口组接口始终被视为 自动侦听。

entities.name: MaxCalls
entities.description: Specifies the maximum number of concurrent remote procedure calls. The value should not be zero and should be greater than MinimumCallThreads. Values greater than 0x7FFFFFFF are silently set to 0x7FFFFFFF. On Windows XP/2000: Setting MaxCalls to RPC_C_LISTEN_MAX_CALLS_DEFAULT removes the limit on concurrent RPC calls.

entities.name: MaxRpcSize
entities.description: 传入数据块的最大大小（以字节为单位）。MaxRpcSize可用于帮助防止恶意拒绝服务攻击。如果远程过程调用的数据块大于MaxRpcSize，则RPC运行时库将拒绝该调用，并向客户端发送RPC_S_ACCESS_DENIED错误。在MaxRpcSize中指定(unsigned int)-1的值将取消对传入数据块大小的限制。此参数对通过ncalrpc协议进行的调用没有影响。
entities.remarks: 为了注册接口，服务器需要提供接口规范、管理器类型UUID和管理器EPV。所有接口组接口都被视为自动侦听。一旦激活接口组，运行时就会开始侦听调用。

entities.name: IfCallback
entities.description: 指向RPC_INTERFACE_GROUP_IDLE_CALLBACK_FN安全回调函数的指针，或针对无回调设置为NULL。每个已注册的接口可以具有不同的回调函数。

return_value.description: 成功后返回RPC_S_OK。 注意 有关有效错误代码的列表，请参阅 RPC 返回值。

entities.remarks: 在IfCallback中指定安全回调函数可让服务器应用程序限制对各个客户端接口的访问。默认情况下安全性是可选的；即使服务器已调用RpcServerRegisterAuthInfo，服务器运行时也会调度不安全的调用。如果服务器只接受经过身份验证的客户端，接口回调函数必须调用RpcBindingInqAuthClient或RpcGetAuthorizationContextForClient。

entities.name: RPC_IF_ALLOW_SECURE_ONLY
entities.description: Specifies that only secure calls are allowed on Windows XP and later versions. Null session calls will be rejected. IfCallback function should return RPC_S_OK to allow client calls. Any other return code will cause client to receive RPC_S_ACCESS_DENIED exception.

entities.name: RequestedMgmtOperation
entities.description: 指定授权函数使用的管理操作类型，用于确定客户端是否有权限执行请求的管理功能

entities.name: RPC_C_MGMT_INQ_PRINC_NAME
entities.description: RPC management constant for inquiring principal names

entities.name: RPC_C_MGMT_IS_SERVER_LISTEN
entities.description: RPC管理常量，用于检查服务器是否正在监听
entities.return_value: 如果服务器正在监听则返回TRUE，否则返回FALSE

entities.name: RPC_C_USE_INTERNET_PORT
entities.description: Specifies to use a system default port from those defined as 'Internet available' in the registry. Only valid for ncacn_ip_tcp and ncadg_ip_udp protocol sequences.

entities.name: RPC_C_MQ_TEMPORARY
entities.description: Specifies that the message queue is temporary in RPC communications

entities.name: RPC_C_MQ_AUTHENTICATE
entities.description: Specifies that message queuing authentication should be used

entities.name: RPC_C_MQ_AUTHN_LEVEL_PKT_INTEGRITY
entities.description: Specifies the authentication level for RPC message queuing with packet integrity checking. Only valid for ncadg_mq protocol sequence.

entities.name: RPC_C_AUTHN_LEVEL_PKT_PRIVACY
entities.description: Specifies that the server's receive queue only accepts client calls with authentication level RPC_C_AUTHN_LEVEL_PKT_PRIVACY. Calls with lower authentication levels are ignored. Only valid for ncadg_mq protocol sequence.

entities.name: RPC_C_BIND_TO_ALL_NICS
entities.description: Specifies binding behavior to NICs. When using RPC_POLICY structure to define message queue properties, always use this value. Overrides registry settings and binds to all NICs.

entities.name: RPC_C_QOS_CAPABILITIES_DEFAULT
entities.description: Used when no provider-specific capabilities are required.

entities.name: RPC_C_QOS_CAPABILITIES_MUTUAL_AUTH
entities.description: Specifies mutual authentication capability for RPC quality of service. When this flag is used without provider-specific capabilities, it causes RPC runtime to request mutual authentication from security providers. Note that some security providers may falsely report successful negotiation of this capability (e.g., NTLM for backward compatibility) even when they don't actually support mutual authentication.

entities.name: RPC_C_QOS_CAPABILITIES_MAKE_FULLSIC
entities.description: Specifies RPC quality of service capabilities for making full security checks

entities.name: RPC_C_QOS_CAPABILITIES_IGNORE_DELEGATE_FAILURE
entities.description: Specifies that the RPC runtime should ignore errors when establishing a security context that supports delegation. Normally, if a client requests delegation and the security system cannot establish a supporting context, RPC_S_SEC_PKG_ERROR is returned. When this flag is specified, no error is returned.

entities.name: RPC_C_QOS_CAPABILITIES_SCHANNEL_FULL_AUTH_IDENTITY
entities.description: Specifies Schannel full authentication identity capabilities for RPC quality of service. When set, indicates the client's RPC runtime should ignore errors when establishing a security context supporting delegation.

entities.name: RPC_S_SEC_PKG_ERROR
entities.description: RPC安全包错误。RPC依赖于SSP(安全支持提供程序)来指示安全选项的成功协商，某些安全提供程序可能错误报告选项的成功协商。此常量仅由SCHANNEL SSP使用，客户端RPC运行时会忽略该错误以建立支持委派的安全上下文。

entities.name: ServerPrincName
entities.description: Parameter value passed to GetKeyFn function. RPC runtime automatically provides value for KeyVer parameter. For KeyVer parameter value of zero, the function must return the latest available key. The function returns authentication key in the Key parameter. If GetKeyFn returns status other than RPC_S_OK, RpcServerRegisterAuthInfo will fail and return error code to server application. If called during client authentication and returns non-RPC_S_OK status, the request fails with error returned to client. Arg points to parameter to pass to GetKeyFn routine (if specified). When authentication service is SCHANNEL, this parameter can also pass pointer to additional data.

entities.name: RPC_C_QOS_IDENTITY_STATIC
entities.description: Specifies that the client identity remains static during the RPC call

entities.name: ImpersonationType
entities.description: 服务器进程可以模拟客户端的级别

entities.name: RPC_C_IMP_LEVEL_ANONYMOUS
entities.description: Specifies anonymous impersonation level where client provides no identification information to server. Servers cannot impersonate or identify clients.

entities.name: RPC_C_IMP_LEVEL_IMPERSONATE
entities.description: Specifies the impersonation level where the server can impersonate the client's security context on its local system but not on remote systems. The server can make outgoing calls while impersonating the client.

entities.name: RPC_C_AUTHN_GSS_NEGOTIATE
entities.description: Specifies GSS (Generic Security Services) Negotiate authentication service for RPC

entities.name: RPC_C_AUTHN_GSS_KERBEROS
entities.description: Specifies Kerberos authentication service for RPC using GSS (Generic Security Services) API.

entities.name: IdentityTracking
entities.description: Specifies endpoint registration for principals identified in Sid members (available in RPC_SECURITY_QOS_V3, RPC_SECURITY_QOS_V4, and RPC_SECURITY_QOS_V5). Sets context tracking mode. Note: Not supported on Windows XP and earlier client versions, or Windows 2000 and earlier server versions.

entities.name: RPC_C_AUTHN_INFO_TYPE_HTTP
entities.description: Specifies that HTTP credentials should not be passed in the union. The HttpCredentials member of the union points to this value.

entities.name: RPC_HTTP_TRANSPORT_CREDENTIALS_W
entities.description: Contains HTTP transport credentials for RPC communication.

members.name: Version
members.description: 正在使用的 RPC_SECURITY_QOS 结构的版本。 本主题介绍 RPC_SECURITY_QOS 结构的版本 2。 有关其他版本，请参阅 RPC_SECURITY_QOS、 RPC_SECURITY_QOS_V3、

entities.name: RPC_C_QOS_CAPABILITIES_LOCAL_MA_HINT
entities.description: Hint indicating local machine account capabilities (not supported on Windows 2000 and earlier server versions). Only used with dynamic endpoints and mutual authentication. Not supported with ncadg_ protocol sequence. Using this flag forces RPC runtime to only request endpoints registered by the principal specified in ServerPrincName or Sid members, preventing local machine spoofing attacks.

entities.name: RPC_C_STATS_CALLS_IN
entities.description: 统计由绑定句柄指定的RPC服务器接收的远程过程调用数。该常量用于RPC统计信息收集。
entities.remarks: 该统计值是RPC_C_STATS_VECTOR结构的一部分。应用程序通过调用RpcMgmtInqStats获取统计信息，并使用RpcMgmtStatsVectorFree释放内存。

entities.name: RPC_S_INVALID_BINDING
entities.description: RPC错误代码，表示绑定句柄无效
entities.remarks: 应用程序调用RpcBindingInqObject函数时可能返回此错误代码，表示绑定句柄无效

entities.name: RPC_S_WRONG_KIND_OF_BINDING
entities.description: RPC错误代码，表示绑定类型不正确
entities.remarks: 以下协议序列支持 RpcBindingServerFromClient： ncadg_ip_udp ncadg_ipx ncacn_ip_tcp ncacn_spx。 windows 2000) ncacn_np (生效 ncacn_http ncalrpc 应用程序从 RPC 运行时获取客户端绑定句柄。 当远程过程调用到达服务器时，运行时会创建一个客户端绑定句柄，其中包含有关调用客户端的信息。 运行时将此句柄作为第一个参数传递给服务器管理器函数。 调用 RpcBindingServerFromClient 会将此客户端句柄转换为具有以下属性的服务器句柄： 服务器句柄是部分绑定的句柄。 它包含调用客户端的网络地址，但缺少终结点。 服务器句柄包含调用客户端使用的同一对象 UUID 。 这可以是 nil UUID。 有关客户端如 何为调用指定对象 UUID 的详细信息，请参阅 RpcBindingsetObject、 RpcNsBindingImportBegin、 RpcNsBindingLookupBegin 和 RpcBindingFromStringBinding。服务器句柄不包含身份验证信息。 服务器应用程序必须调用 RpcBindingFree ，以释放服务器绑定句柄不再需要的资源。 注意 若要查询客户端的地址，应用程序首先调用 RpcBindingServerFromClient 函数以获取部分绑定的服务器绑定句柄。 服务器绑定句柄可用于通过调用 RpcBindingToStringBinding 来获取字符串绑定。 然后，服务器可以调用 RpcStringBindingParse，以从字符串绑定中提取客户端的网络地址。

entities.name: DestinationBinding
entities.description: 绑定句柄引用的绑定信息。对 DestinationBinding 绑定句柄执行的操作不会影响 SourceBinding 绑定句柄引用的绑定信息。如果应用程序希望一个线程对绑定信息的更改影响其他线程使用的绑定信息，则应用程序应在线程之间共享单个绑定句柄。应用程序负责绑定句柄并发控制。

entities.name: RPC_BINDING_HANDLE_TEMPLATE
entities.description: Describes the structure of binding handle to be created. This data may be overwritten during the call, so the API does not maintain a reference to this data. The caller must free the memory used by this structure when the API returns.

entities.name: RPC_BINDING_HANDLE_SECURITY
entities.description: 描述RPC绑定句柄的安全选项结构。在调用期间可能会覆盖此数据，因此API不会维护对此数据的引用。调用方必须在API返回时释放此结构使用的内存。此参数是可选的，如果设置为NULL，将使用默认安全设置。

entities.name: RPC_BINDING_HANDLE_OPTIONS
entities.description: 描述RPC绑定句柄的附加选项。调用期间可能覆盖此数据，调用方需负责释放内存。可选参数，若为NULL则使用默认选项。

return_value.description: 此函数返回成功RPC_S_OK;否则，将返回RPC_S_* 错误代码。 有关这些错误代码的信息，请参阅 RPC 返回值。 返回代码 RPC_S_OK

entities.name: RPC_S_INVALID_STRING_BINDING
entities.description: Invalid string binding error code in RPC
entities.remarks: 应用程序调用 RpcStringBindingParse 例程，将绑定句柄的字符串表示形式分析为其组件字段。 RPC 运行时库为返回的每个组件字符串分配内存。 应用程序负责为每个返回的字符串调用 RpcStringFree 一次，以解除分配该字符串的内存。 如果 StringBinding 参数的任何字段为空， RpcStringBindingParse 将在相应的输出参数中返回空字符串 (\0) 。 注意 若要查询客户端的地址，应用程序首先调用 RpcBindingServerFromClient 函数以获取部分绑定的服务器绑定句柄。 服务器绑定句柄可用于通过调用 RpcBindingToStringBinding 来获取字符串绑定。 然后，服务器可以调用 RpcStringBindingParse，以从字符串绑定中提取客户端的网络地址。

entities.name: RPC_S_INVALID_ENDPOINT_FORMAT
entities.description: RPC错误代码：终结点格式无效

entities.name: StringBinding
entities.description: Represents a string binding handle in RPC. If the StringBinding parameter does not contain an object UUID, the returned binding contains nil UUID. If the endpoint field is missing, it's a partially-bound handle. If host address is missing, it refers to localhost. Created via RpcStringBindingCompose or string constant.

entities.name: ClientBinding
entities.description: Represents a binding handle for remote procedure calls (RPC). Contains authentication level and service information for RPC calls. Related to RpcBindingInqAuthClientEx function.

entities.name: AuthzSvc
entities.description: 指定授权服务常量，用于RPC绑定查询。当设置为null时，RpcBindingInqAuthClientEx不会返回AuthzSvc参数。RPC_C_AUTHN_WINNT身份验证服务不使用此参数，返回值始终为RPC_S_AUTHZ_NONE。

entities.name: RPC_C_FULL_CERT_CHAIN
entities.description: Specifies that the full certificate chain should be passed for principal name verification.

entities.name: RpcBindingInqAuthClientExA
entities.description: 服务器应用程序调用 RpcBindingInqAuthClientExA 函数以获取有关进行远程过程调用的客户端程序的扩展信息。

entities.name: RPC_S_AUTHZ_NONE
entities.description: Flags controlling principal name format for RPC authentication

entities.name: RPC_BINDING_HAS_NO_AUTH
entities.description: Indicates the binding handle has no authentication information.
entities.remarks: Client applications call RpcBindingInqAuthInfoEx function to view authentication and authorization information associated with a server binding handle.

entities.name: RpcBindingInqOption
entities.description: Queries an option value for an RPC binding handle. Supported in Windows 2000 and later.

entities.name: AuthnLevel
entities.description: Specifies the authentication level used for RPC calls. The actual level returned may differ from what was specified in RpcBindingSetAuthInfoEx if the runtime upgrades to a higher supported level.

entities.name: RPC_C_SECURITY_QOS_VERSION
entities.description: Defines the version of RPC security quality of service settings.

entities.name: ServerBinding
entities.description: 表示RPC服务器的绑定句柄结构

entities.name: RPC_C_AUTHN_WINNT
entities.description: Specifies Windows NTLMSSP (NT LAN Manager Security Support Provider) authentication service for RPC. When using this authentication service, AuthIdentity parameter should point to SEC_WINNT_AUTH_IDENTITY structure.

entities.name: SCHANNEL_CRED
entities.description: Specifies Schannel credentials for authentication. Passing NULL uses the current address space's security context. Passing RPC_C_NO_CREDENTIALS uses anonymous login context. Note: When using RPC_C_AUTHN_GSS_SCHANNEL authentication service, AuthIdentity parameter may also point to SCH_CRED structure.

entities.name: RPC_S_UNKNOWN_AUTHN_SERVICE
entities.description: 身份验证服务未知的错误代码。当客户端指定的身份验证服务不是服务器注册的服务之一时返回此错误。
entities.remarks: 服务器应用程序调用RpcServerRegisterAuthInfo注册身份验证服务。如果客户端指定的身份验证服务不是服务器注册的服务之一，远程过程调用将失败并返回此状态代码。

entities.name: AuthIdentity
entities.description: Specifies authentication identity information. Exception occurs when an application uses rpcBindingSetAuthInfoEx with RPC_C_QOS_IDENTITY_DYNAMIC and specifies a non-NULL value for AuthIdentity. Note: RpcBindingSetAuthInfo function must not be called on a binding handle while RPC calls are in progress on the same handle, as this yields undefined results. Microsoft recommends applications maintain pointers to AuthIdentity parameter while binding handle exists for better portability.

entities.name: RPC_C_NO_CREDENTIALS
entities.description: Specifies no credentials should be used for RPC authentication. When using RPC_C_AUTHN_WINNT authentication service, this parameter is ignored.

entities.name: SecurityQOS
entities.description: Specifies security quality of service settings for RPC calls, including SPN and mutual authentication requirements.

entities.name: RPC_S_ACCESS_DENIED
entities.description: RPC错误代码，表示访问被拒绝

return_value.description: 成功后返回RPC_S_OK。 注意 有关有效错误代码的列表，请参阅 RPC 返回值。

entities.name: RPC_S_NO_BINDINGS
entities.description: RPC调用成功但未找到绑定句柄时的返回代码
entities.remarks: 服务器应用程序调用 RpcServerInterfaceGroupInqBindings 以获取给定接口组的服务器绑定句柄的向量。 当服务器应用程序调用 RpcServerInterfaceGroupActivate 函数时，RPC 运行时库为接口组创建绑定句柄。 返回的绑定向量可以包含具有动态终结点的绑定句柄或具有已知终结点的绑定句柄，具体取决于接口组的终结点规范。 服务器使用绑定句柄的向量导出到名称服务或转换为字符串绑定。 如果没有绑定句柄 (没有注册的协议序列 ) ，RpcServerInterfaceGroupInqBindings 将返回 RPC_S_NO_BINDINGS 并且 BindingVector 为 NULL。 服务器负责调用 RpcBindingVectorFree 以释放向量的内存。

entities.name: RpcEpRegisterA
entities.description: RpcEpRegisterA函数在本地终结点映射数据库中添加或替换服务器地址信息。

entities.name: RpcExceptionFilter
entities.description: 默认的RPC异常过滤器，用于判断异常是致命还是非致命的。建议在结构化异常处理中使用此函数处理常见异常。

parameters.name: ExceptionCode
parameters.description: 异常的值。 以下任何异常值都将返回 EXCEPTION_CONTINUE_SEARCH：

entities.name: RpcImpersonateClient
entities.description: Impersonates the client that made the RPC call

entities.name: SeImpersonatePrivilege
entities.description: Windows安全特权常量，允许进程模拟客户端安全上下文。当启用此特权时，服务可以模拟客户端身份执行操作。

entities.name: RPC_S_OUT_OF_THREADS
entities.description: RPC error code indicating the server has exhausted its thread pool resources
entities.remarks: This error occurs when the RPC server cannot allocate a thread to process the request. The RPC runtime may automatically enable idle resource cleanup when certain thresholds are reached in Windows XP and later versions.

entities.name: RPC_EP_INQ_HANDLE
entities.description: Handle used for RPC endpoint mapping inquiry operations.

parameters.name: EpBinding
parameters.description: 绑定到要查看其终结点映射元素的主机的句柄。 指定 NULL 可查看本地主机中的元素。 如果指定了绑定句柄，则绑定句柄上的对象 UUID 必须为 NULL。 如果存在，则忽略绑定句柄上的终结 点，并使用给定主机上终结点映射器数据库的终结点。 InquiryType 指示要在终结点映射上执行的查询类型的整数值。 以下是有效的查询类型。 值

entities.name: RPC_C_EP_MATCH_BY_IF
entities.description: Specifies to search endpoint map elements containing the interface identifier specified by IfId and VersOption parameters.

entities.name: IfId
entities.description: 接口标识符类型，用于RPC配置文件搜索操作。当InquiryType参数指定为RPC_C_PROFILE_MATCH_BY_IF或RPC_C_PROFILE_MATCH_BY_BOTH时使用。

entities.name: RPC_C_VERS_COMPATIBLE
entities.description: Specifies version compatibility mode for RPC interfaces

entities.name: RPC_C_VERS_MAJOR_ONLY
entities.description: Specifies that only the major version of the interface UUID should be considered when matching configuration elements.

entities.name: RPC_C_VERS_UPTO
entities.description: Specifies the maximum version number for RPC interface binding. When used with RPC_IF_ID_VECTOR, it indicates to unbind all interfaces with versions up to the specified version.

entities.name: RPC_C_EP_MATCH_BY_OBJ
entities.description: Specifies endpoint matching by object UUID. Used when matching criteria is RPC_C_EP_MATCH_BY_OBJ or RPC_C_EP_MATCH_BY_BOTH.

entities.name: InquiryContext
entities.description: 从 RpcNsProfileEltInqBegin 函数返回的名称服务句柄，用于查询配置文件元素信息。包含指向接口标识、成员名称和优先级的指针。

entities.name: RPC_S_CANT_PERFORM_OP
entities.description: 调用成功，但无法执行请求的操作。有关有效错误代码的列表，请参阅RPC返回值。

entities.name: EpBinding
entities.description: Specifies endpoint binding information. The object UUID associated with the EpBinding parameter must be a nil UUID. Specifying a non-nil UUID causes the function to fail with status code EPT_S_CANT_PERFORM_OP. All information in this parameter, except for host information and object UUID, is ignored. Applications call RpcMgmtEpEltInqNext to view local endpoint map elements.

entities.name: RPC_S_UNKNOWN_AUTH_SERVICE
entities.description: RPC错误代码：未知的身份验证服务。
entities.remarks: 应用程序调用 RpcMgmtInqDefaultProtectLevel 函数以获取指定身份验证服务的默认身份验证 级别。

entities.name: RPC_S_NOT_LISTENING
entities.description: RPC错误代码，表示所有远程过程调用已完成，但另一个线程已调用RpcMgmtWaitServerListen且尚未返回。服务器应用程序必须先调用RpcServerListen才能调用RpcMgmtWaitServerListen。
entities.remarks: 当 RpcServerListen 标志参数 DontWait 具有非零值时， RpcServerListen 函数将返回到服务器应用程序，而无需执行等待操作。 在这种情况下，等待可由 RpcMgmtWaitServerListen 执行。 在调用 RpcMgmtWaitServerListen 之前， 应用程序必须使用 DontWait 参数的非零值调用 RpcServerListen。 RpcMgmtWaitServerListen 函数在服务器应用程序调用

entities.name: AuthorizationFn
entities.description: 指定授权函数。每当服务器运行时收到执行远程管理功能的客户端请求时，RPC服务器运行时库会自动调用此函数。服务器必须实现此函数。应用程序可指定NULL值以注销之前注册的授权函数，之后将使用默认授权。

entities.name: ThreadStackSize
entities.description: Specifies the stack size (in bytes) allocated for each thread created by the RPC runtime. This value applies to all threads created for the server, but not to pre-existing threads. Choose this value based on the stack requirements of the remote procedures provided by the server.

entities.name: RPC_S_NO_PROTSEQS

parameters.name: ProtseqVector

entities.name: RPC_S_INVALID_RPC_PROTSEQ
entities.description: RPC错误代码：表示指定的协议序列无效或不受支持

entities.name: RPC_C_NS_SYNTAX_DEFAULT
entities.description: Specifies the default name service syntax for RPC name resolution.

entities.name: RPC_S_INVALID_NAME_SYNTAX

entities.remarks: 应用程序调用 RpcNsEntryExpandName 函数以获取完全扩展的条目名称。 RPC 运行时库为返回的 ExpandedName 参数分配内存。 应用程序负责为返回的字符串调用 RpcStringFree 函数。 返回的扩展条目名称帐户用于本地名称转换，以及本地定义的命名架构的差异。 注意 此函数需要 Active Directory 支持。 ７ 备注
